title: PR Review & Fix Cycle
description: Visualizes the default engine flow: review a PR, fix issues if rejected, re-review until approved and build passes.

stages.title: Review PR
stages.description: Review the target PR for correctness, quality, and completeness. Provide actionable feedback if changes are needed.

stages.title: Fix review feedback
stages.description: Address all review comments and push fixes to the PR branch.

stages.title: Re-review after fix
stages.description: Re-review the PR after fixes have been applied. Verify all prior feedback was addressed.
